expectedIssues: Top nav button is missing text
reportedIssues: The yellow rounded button in the top-right header appears blank, with no visible label or icon. It looks like a missing CTA such as Sign Up, Log In, or Deposit.
The “SCROLL DOWN” overlay sits on top of the legal disclaimer area and partially obscures the fine print near the bottom of the promo section.
The legal disclaimer text is extremely small and low contrast, making it difficult to read, especially on mobile.

expected.reasoning: Issue 0 describes a blank button in the top-right header with no visible label, matching the expected defect of a top nav button missing text.
